clips.title: The Deal
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A dim boardroom at night, a long table, city lights through the window. An over-the-shoulder shot framed from behind one person's shoulder in the foreground (soft, out of focus), looking across the table at a second person sharply in focus who slides a document forward. People in sharp business suits. Warm interior light, cool window glow, 50mm, over-the-shoulder. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Viewing
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, refined grade. A quiet art gallery, white walls, a large framed painting. An over-the-shoulder shot framed from behind a person's shoulder in the foreground (soft), looking past them at the painting they contemplate, sharp on the artwork. A person in smart attire. Soft gallery light, clean tones, 50mm, over-the-shoulder. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Mirror
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, intimate grade. A dim dressing room, warm bulbs around a mirror. An over-the-shoulder shot framed from behind a person's shoulder in the foreground (soft), looking at their own reflection sharp in the mirror, meeting their own gaze. A person in an elegant outfit. Warm bulb light, soft shadow, 50mm, over-the-shoulder. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The View
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, cinematic grade. A high-rise office at dusk, floor-to-ceiling windows, a glittering city beyond. An over-the-shoulder shot framed from behind a person's shoulder in the foreground (soft), looking past them at the sweeping city skyline sharp beyond the glass. A person in a tailored shirt. Warm interior, cool city glow, 50mm, over-the-shoulder. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Interview
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, clean grade. A bright modern office, a desk between two chairs. An over-the-shoulder shot framed from behind an interviewer's shoulder in the foreground (soft), looking across the desk at a second person sharp in focus, mid-answer. People in smart office attire. Soft daylight, clean tones, 50mm, over-the-shoulder. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Match
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, focused grade. A quiet study, a chess table between two chairs, warm lamp. An over-the-shoulder shot framed from behind one player's shoulder in the foreground (soft), looking across the chessboard at the opponent sharp in focus, considering a move. People in smart-casual attire. Warm lamplight, deep shadow, 50mm, over-the-shoulder. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
